creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
On 10:55 Fri 01 Feb, Ruslan Makhmatkhanov wrote:

> Christer Edwards wrote on 01.02.2013 08:55:
> >
> >> Number:         175749
> >> Category:       ports
> >> Synopsis:       New Port: net/py-botocore - Botocore is a low-level interface to a growing number of Amazon Web Services.
> 
> Please note, that I already added this port as devel/py-botocore 
> yesterday (PR ports/174673). But it worth to update to 0.5.3 if 
> maintainer approves (cc'ed).

Not a time to update botocore. Instead, I'm still waiting for
ports/174674 to be committed. And then both botocore and awscli may be
updated (together, as awscli depends on botocore) to 0.5.x branch.
I have patches for this already, but uncommitted ports/174674 makes me
stop from sending it.

So, please, hook up ports/174674 (New port: devel/awscli) anybody. And
I'll update botocore and awscli afterwards.

Thanks!

-- 
Alexey V. Degtyarev
